title: Fix table/match-pairs cell editing, inline images with formatting, print-safe rendering, and theme updates

requirements.summary: Update light-mode theme tokens so the navigation drawer is white and purple accents match the lighter screenshot purple globally without breaking dark mode.
acceptanceCriteria: On mobile and desktop, the NavigationDrawer background is white and visually matches the uploaded screenshots.
Purple accents throughout the app (e.g., primary buttons, selected nav item, outlines) use the lighter purple matching the uploaded screenshots, not the current darker purple.
No regressions in dark-mode toggling (dark mode can remain purple-themed, but light mode must match the screenshots).

file_operations.description: Adjust light-mode CSS variables (e.g., --primary, --ring, --sidebar-*) so the sidebar/drawer uses a white background with appropriate foreground, and the app-wide primary purple is lighter to match screenshots; keep dark-mode variables unchanged or only minimally adjusted to avoid regressions.

Ensure drawer styling is fully driven by theme tokens (bg-sidebar / sidebar-* colors) and selected nav item uses the updated lighter purple accent in light mode; keep behavior consistent across mobile/desktop. Use shadcn-ui Button/Separator composition as already present (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.)

Align mobile header + mobile SheetContent drawer backgrounds/borders with the updated light-mode sidebar tokens so the drawer/header are white in light mode while preserving dark mode. Use shadcn-ui Sheet/Button composition as already present (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.)

requirements.summary: Fix focus/typing for table cells and match-pairs boxes so keystrokes update only the clicked cell/box and do not redirect to the main question text field.
acceptanceCriteria: When a table cell is clicked and the user types, only that cell content changes; the question text at the top does not change.
When a match-pairs box (Column A or Column B) is clicked and the user types, only that box content changes; the question text at the top does not change.
Typing into table/match-pairs cells works consistently on mobile and desktop.

file_operations.description: Prevent event bubbling and unintended focusing that causes typing to go to the question text field (e.g., stopPropagation on mouse/touch events inside table/match-pairs editors; ensure autofocus logic only runs when intended and does not steal focus after a cell is focused).
Harden the question selection click handler so interactions within active editors (table/match-pairs inputs) do not trigger parent click behaviors that re-focus the top question field.

requirements.summary: Enable inline image insertion (upload + clipboard paste) inside table cells and match-pairs boxes while allowing mixed text+images and preventing overflow outside cell boundaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Each table cell and each match-pairs box provides a UI affordance to insert an image via file upload.
Pasting an image from the clipboard into a focused table cell/match-pairs box inserts the image into that cell/box.
Text can be entered in the same cell/box that contains an inserted image (both are persisted and rendered together).
Cell/box content is constrained: images and text do not visually overflow outside the cell/box boundary (overflow is clipped/wrapped appropriately).

file_operations.description: Add frontend-only helpers/types for rich cell/box content (text + images), including safe clipboard image extraction, data URL handling, and utilities to add/remove/update images within a cell.

Create a reusable editor for a single table cell or match-pairs box that supports: text input, an insert-image button (file input), clipboard image paste while focused, and overflow-safe rendering within a bounded container. Compose shadcn-ui primitives where helpful (e.g., Button, Input, Dialog/Popover) without editing files under frontend/src/components/ui (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.)
Replace string-only table cell and match-pairs box inputs with RichCellEditor so each cell/box can store mixed text+images and paste/upload images directly into that specific cell/box.

Add/adjust editor-only utility classes for rich cell containers to ensure content stays within boundaries (wrapping/clipping) and images scale within the cell; ensure this does not break existing global styles.

requirements.summary: Add per-image formatting controls in cells/boxes: default 5×5 cm sizing, adjustable size, aspect ratio lock by default, alignment, and captions.
acceptanceCriteria: Newly inserted images default to 5cm × 5cm sizing in a print-relevant unit (cm) and render consistently in the editor and print preview.
Users can adjust the image size; by default, resizing preserves aspect ratio until the user explicitly unlocks it.
Users can set image alignment within the cell/box (e.g., left/center/right).
Users can add/edit/remove an image caption that stays associated with the image and renders under/near the image inside the same cell/box.

file_operations.description: Extend rich image metadata to include print-relevant size in cm, aspect-lock flag, alignment, and caption; provide helpers to update these fields and to compute consistent rendering styles.

Implement UI controls per image for sizing (default 5cm×5cm), aspect lock toggle, alignment (left/center/right), and caption editing; ensure controls are editor-only and not shown in print. Compose shadcn-ui primitives (e.g., Button, Input, Tabs/Dialog if needed) without editing frontend/src/components/ui (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.)
Render inline images (with captions and alignment) within table cells and match-pairs boxes using the saved rich metadata so output matches editor and is print-friendly.
Add print/editor CSS for rich inline images to honor cm sizing, alignment, and captions, while ensuring images never overflow their cell/box.

requirements.summary: Enforce equal-width table columns and row-based equal heights in editor and preserve behavior in print/preview as closely as possible.
acceptanceCriteria: In the editor, a table with N columns renders with equal column widths regardless of per-cell content.
In the editor, all cells in a given row share the same height; rows can differ in height from other rows based on their content.
In print preview/printed output, the same equal-width and row-based height behavior is preserved as closely as the medium allows.

file_operations.description: Update table rendering in the editor to enforce equal column widths (e.g., fixed table layout + column sizing strategy) and ensure each row’s cell heights remain equal within the row (letting the row height be driven by the tallest cell).
Update print/preview table rendering to preserve equal column widths and natural row-based equal heights while rendering rich cell content (text + images + captions).
Add/adjust CSS classes for tables used in the editor and renderer to enforce equal-width columns, safe wrapping, and cell-boundary clipping appropriate for both screen and print.

requirements.summary: Make print output A4-safe for tables/match-pairs with inline images and captions, ensuring no overflow and hiding editor-only UI in print.
acceptanceCriteria: Printing/export preview for papers containing table/match-pairs images does not cause images to overflow outside their cell/box in the printed output.
Tables and match-pairs content remain readable in print: text wraps and images scale within cell boundaries.
No print-only UI controls (buttons, toolbars) appear in the printed output.

file_operations.description: Refine @media print rules to avoid globally forcing overflow: visible in a way that breaks cell clipping; apply print-safe wrapping/clipping rules specifically for paper content and rich table/match-pairs cell containers; keep A4 sizing behavior predictable.
Ensure paper content wrappers use stable class names/structure that print CSS can reliably target for wrapping/clipping and for avoiding page-break issues in tables/match-pairs.

Confirm all non-paper UI is excluded from print (use existing print:hidden usage consistently) so controls/toolbars do not appear in printed output. Compose shadcn-ui components as currently used (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.)

requirements.summary: Persist and load rich table/match-pairs cell content (text + images with formatting), including auto-migrating older localStorage papers with string[][] cells and string pairs.
acceptanceCriteria: Existing saved papers that contain tableData.cells as string[][] continue to load without crashing, and are normalized into the new structure automatically.
After editing and reloading the app, table/match-pairs cell content (text, images, captions, size, alignment) is retained.
No runtime errors occur when rendering older or newer saved papers.

file_operations.description: Update TypeScript types to represent richer table/match-pairs content (cell/box content that can include text plus zero or more images with formatting metadata) while keeping compatibility considerations in mind for persisted JSON.

Extend normalization during load to migrate older saved papers (string[][] table cells and string-based match pairs) into the new rich structure; ensure save/load round-trips preserve all rich metadata without runtime errors.
Add migration/normalization helpers to convert legacy cell/box string content into the new rich structure and to keep the normalization logic centralized and reusable.
Make renderer resilient to any remaining legacy shapes (defensive rendering) while primarily targeting the normalized rich structure to prevent crashes when encountering older saved data.
